title: staehelina arborescens
intro: Staehelina arborescens, also known as tree staehelina or tree staehelina arborescens, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Staehelina arborescens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
